notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-289 — thanks for testing! New in this build: ⛶ FULL SCREEN (a top-bar button expands the app to fill the screen; Esc or tap-again to exit), and a light-mode fix so the loaded-market status pill ('ASX · date · N stocks · live') no longer stays dark. Recent batch also includes: the 🔔 briefing reopen fix, ☀️ light/dark mode, 📋 My trading rules, the security re-audit, the watchlist search-clear fix, 🕳 Gap Report, 🧱 Strong Trends, sticky 💧 Liquidity floor, and clearer Sharp Mover vs Unusual Activity. (A couple of pop-ups — the price chart and dark tooltips/panels — are still dark in light mode; a deliberate polish item, all readable.) This copy updates separately from the released app. Anything odd, confusing or brilliant — use the ✉ feedback link in the top-left.
